children.heading: Repeal of statutory authorities relating to investigation, experiments, and tests in reforestation and forest products
children.label: a Repeal of statutory authorities relating to investigation, experiments, and tests in reforestation and forest products
children.text: The Act of , known as the McSweeney-McNary Act (, as amended; , 581a, 581b–581i), is hereby repealed.May 22, 192845 Stat. 699–70216 U.S.C. 581

children.heading: Force and effect of cooperative and other agreements under repealed statutory authorities relating to investigation, etc., in reforestation and forest products
children.label: b Force and effect of cooperative and other agreements under repealed statutory authorities relating to investigation, etc., in reforestation and forest products
children.text: Contracts and cooperative and other agreements under the McSweeney-McNary Act shall remain in effect until revoked or amended by their own terms or under other provisions of law.

children.heading: Issuance of rules and regulations for implementation of provisions and coordination with agricultural research, extension, and teaching provisions
children.label: c Issuance of rules and regulations for implementation of provisions and coordination with agricultural research, extension, and teaching provisions
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to issue such rules and regulations as the Secretary deems necessary to implement the provisions of this subchapter and to coordinate this subchapter with title XIV of the Food and Agriculture Act of 1977 [ et seq.].7 U.S.C. 3101

children.heading: Availability of funds appropriated under repealed statutory authorities relating to investigation, etc., in reforestation and forest products
children.label: d Availability of funds appropriated under repealed statutory authorities relating to investigation, etc., in reforestation and forest products
children.text: Funds appropriated under the authority of the McSweeney-McNary Act shall be available for expenditure for the programs authorized under this subchapter.
